scripts.export-schemas: node -e "const path=require('node:path');const {spawnSync}=require('node:child_process');const cwd=path.resolve(__dirname,'../..');const r=spawnSync('go',['run','./servers/mcp/cmd/export-schemas'],{cwd,stdio:'inherit'});if(r.error&&r.error.code==='ENOENT'){console.warn('go 未安装，跳过 schemas 导出（使用仓库内已有的 JSON schemas）');process.exit(0);}process.exit(typeof r.status==='number'?r.status:1);"
scripts.build: npm run export-schemas && tsc && node esbuild.config.mjs
